kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 20000.0, "tracesDir": "/Users/nookdoppio/Documents/GitHub/assign-automation-mar-2026/testcases/browser/browser/traces/temp/da79315b-d3f6-4def-8440-000b1d242ddd"}

Successfully created browser with options: {"browser":"chromium","headless":false,"chromiumSandbox":false,"devtools":false,"handleSIGHUP":true,"handleSIGINT":true,"handleSIGTERM":true,"slowMo":0,"timeout":20000,"tracesDir":"/Users/nookdoppio/Documents/GitHub/assign-automation-mar-2026/testcases/browser/browser/traces/temp/da79315b-d3f6-4def-8440-000b1d242ddd"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.msg: { "acceptDownloads": true, "bypassCSP": false, "forcedColors": "none", "ignoreHTTPSErrors": false, "javaScriptEnabled": true, "offline": false, "reducedMotion": "no-preference", "serviceWorkers": "allow", "viewport": { "height": 720, "width": 1280 } }
Successfully created context.

{'acceptDownloads': True, 'bypassCSP': False, 'forcedColors': 'none', 'ignoreHTTPSErrors': False, 'javaScriptEnabled': True, 'offline': False, 'reducedMotion': 'no-preference', 'serviceWorkers': 'allow', 'viewport': {'height': 720, 'width': 1280}}
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.gother.online/en-us
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=signin-and-register-big-button at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'id=signin-and-register-big-button'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click email or mobile no. button
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=button:has-text("Email or Mobile No.") at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=button:has-text("Email or Mobile No.")'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'sutida.n@doppiotech.com' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=img[alt="user-icon2"] at state visible

kw.msg: States are: ['attached', 'visible', 'enabled', 'defocused']

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Bangkok' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.msg: ${dynamic_locator} = xpath=//div[@id='search-suggestion-container']//*[contains(text(), 'Bangkok')]
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=//div[@id='search-suggestion-container']//*[contains(text(), 'Bangkok')] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'xpath=//div[@id='search-suggestion-container']//*[contains(text(), 'Bangkok')]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.
